'''Xal 3''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xal system/Legends|Xal system]] of the [[Ablajeck sector/Legends|Ablajeck sector]], not far from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It served as the base for the [[Xal 3 Armorers' Confederacy|Armorers' Confederacy]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|340}}</ref>
